raw_prompt_excerpt: Create a python-pptx script generating a 15-slide colorful educational presentation for Medical Students on Anatomy of the Human Heart. Include detailed anatomical diagrams placeholders throughout. Save the output as "Heart_Anatomy.pptx"...

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt, Emu
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE


# ── Deck Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(8)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(6)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Heart_Anatomy.pptx"

PRIMARY_COLOR = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x3A, 0x5C)   # Navy blue
ACCENT_RED = RGBColor(0xE7, 0x4C, 0x3C)       # Red accent

DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x2C, 0x3E, 0x50)        # Dark body text
CARD_BG = RGBColor(0xF8, 0xF9, 0xFA)          # Card background

FONT_HEADING = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"

SUBTITLE_SIZE = Pt(16)
